---
title: "analyses"
author: "Kate Petrova + Nate Yanowitch"
date: "2025-08-07"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = TRUE)

if(!suppressWarnings(require(pacman))){install.packages("pacman");library("pacman")}
p_load(tidyverse, tidyr, dplyr, ggplot2, stats, sjPlot, readr, ggpubr, patchwork, lubridate, devtools, ggdist, ggpubr, showtext, usethis, data.table, png, grid, purrr, ggimage)

devtools::install_github('Mikata-Project/ggthemr')
library(ggthemr)
```

```{r}
ggthemr("fresh", type = "outer", line_weight = 0.5, text_size = 14)

showtext_auto()
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("../data/data_processed.csv")
```
